titleStmt.title: SII 40.13: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 13. (A.R. No. B. 533b of 1929.) Mallipūḍi, Tanuku Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: Slab found in Vishṇu temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1673, Khara, Jyēsṭha ba. 5, Sunday, Irregular.

Records the installation of the liṅga in the temple of Gaṇapēśvara by Subbana, son of Nāgireḍḍi and Aṅkkamāṁba. The donor was the younger brother Venkaṭarāma and elder brother of Jaggayya of the Bhōga family. The liṅga was the work of Akkābattuḍu (the Kāsāchāri), son of Māgulūri Mallikhārjuna and Vīramma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava
rṣaṁbbulu 1673 yagunēṭi kharanāma saṁhvatsara jyē
ṣṭha ba 5 A śrīmadbhōgādi vaṁśapārāvārākā sudhākaru
ṁḍḍunu tippānareḍḍiki prapautṛṁḍunu mūrttireḍḍiki pau
truṁḍunu nāgireḍḍiki suputruṁḍunu Aṁkkamāṁbbāgarbha
śuktimauktikuṁḍḍunu vēṁkkaṭarāmāvarajuṁḍḍunu jaggayyā
khyāggrajuṁḍḍunu bhrātṛvyāccaṁnnāhvaya paripālita
yevvarājyaṁḍḍunu nija suguṇa maṇi gaṇa mālikālaṁ
kṛtāśāṁgganā baṁdhura kaṁdharuṁḍḍagu subbaṁnna dhātrīvaru
ṁḍḍu śrīmadgaṇapēśvaramahādēva liṁggaṁbbunu sāṁ
gaṁbbugā śāśvata dharmaniṣṭhaṁ pratiṣṭhagāviṁccēnū .
śrīmadbhogādhivaṁśa(śā)mṛtanidhividhunā subbayakṣmādhipe(pē)nā śrī
nāgēśātmaje(jē)na prakaṭitayaśasā jaggayākhyāgrajēna śrī
gāṇāpatyaliṁggaṁ sakala surayutaṁ sthāpitaṁ jyēṣṭha
māsē paṁccamyāṁ kṛṣṇapakṣe kharaśaradiravērvāsare vaibhavēna .
śrī kāśācāri māgulūri mallikhārjuḍu bhārya vīraṁ
mmā komāruḍu Akkābattuḍu nirmāṇaṁ cēśānu .
Digital edition of SII 40.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
